We are the movers of the world and the makers of the future. We get up every day, roll up our sleeves and build a better world -- together. At Ford, we’re all a part of something bigger than ourselves. Are you ready to change the way the world moves?

**WHY DO WE NEED YOU?**
The Manufacturing Engineer will provide technical support and lead continuous improvement initiatives for CNC machining operations. This role is responsible for ensuring efficient production processes, optimal machine utilization, and adherence to quality standards. The engineer will collaborate closely with production, quality, and maintenance teams to troubleshoot issues, implement process improvements, and support new product introductions.
  
  
Key responsibilities i

Primary Functions:
  
  
/Develop and coordinates department objectives with the Value Stream Manager and department Supervisors/Process Managers to improve process, tooling procedures, and equipment to meet plant and business unit objectives.
  
  
Duties Include:
  
  
Investigate and solve production problems related to tooling, equipment, and processes.
  
  
Develop, recommend, and implement changes which will result in the improvement of manufacturing processes or product quality.
